falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would indicate extreme buying pressure, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear momentum contrary to a potential bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the prior 52-week high by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would falsify the pattern match to 'bottom_2024_aug' by proving a major bullish breakout rather than a bearish reversal scenario.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
